A method is presented for the computation of
photonuclear cross sections from their x-ray
activation or yield curves. It is based on the photon
of bremsstrahlung spectra and assumes that the

Artificially prepared activation curves have been
satisfactorily solved by this method, and the
in this laboratory have been reanalyzed. The
resulting cross section curves are in essential
agreement with those originally determined; however,
the new values are believed to be more reliable.
